currentTask.name: Git workflow overhaul — all gaps addressed including nice-to-haves
currentTask.goal: Audit and fix all git workflow gaps, then add auto-merge, branch cleanup, and commit-msg hook

whatChanged: scripts/git-agent.sh: removed --no-verify from 4 commit paths (kept in WIP trap only)
scripts/git-agent.sh: added check_branch_protection() — auto-converts end --merge to --pr
scripts/git-agent.sh: improved merge failure handling (reset + preserve branch)
scripts/git-agent.sh: added --auto-merge flag (creates PR, waits for CI, merges automatically)
.github/workflows/ci.yml: CI pipeline with shellcheck, secrets, frontmatter, smoke tests, Playwright
.github/workflows/ci.yml: added 5 quality gate checks (console.log, TODOs, large files, error handling, ASCII)
rules/common/git-workflow.md: two-tier commit system (checkpoint English + PR conventional)
scripts/test-smoke.sh: 3 pre-existing failures fixed (bwrap skip, tool_count 132→134, broken pipe)
scripts/test-smoke.sh: assert_output_contains broken pipe hazard fixed (2>/dev/null)
verification: Branch protection: PR required, strict checks [Lint & Validate, Smoke Tests], linear history, no force-push, deletions blocked, enforce admins — all API-verified
CI fully green: 115/115 smoke tests pass, Lint & Validate passes on every PR
end --merge auto-converts to --pr when branch protection detected (API-verified)
end --auto-merge: creates PR, waits for CI, marks ready, merges (tested end-to-end)
Branch cleanup workflow: valid YAML, triggers on cron + workflow_dispatch
commit-msg hook: passes conventional commits + English imperative, rejects bad messages
Global pre-commit hook (identity gate) passes: B67687 <111849193+B67687@users.noreply.github.com>
Only WIP crash trap retains --no-verify (confirmed: 1 match, line 175)
All branches cleaned: only main + s4-tool-integration-commands worktree remain
PR #2, #3, #4, #5, #6 all merged via protected-branch flow with CI green
keyLearnings: tools.sh --json output is large — piping through echo+grep causes SIGPIPE. Fixed by pre-extracting with python.
npm install -g doesn't help node -e require() — must install locally for browser.sh in CI.
gh api --field stringifies nested objects. Pipe JSON via --input - for complex payloads.
Branch protection detection via gh API is reliable for environment-agnostic scripts.
gh pr merge sometimes returns no output despite succeeding — verify via gh pr view.
Quality gate runs on staged changes only; CI must replicate checks on full tree.
Smoke test expectations (tool_count) drift when tools are added — needs updating after new tools.
Global hooks path (~/.config/git/hooks/) is set via core.hookspath and applies across all repos.
residualRisk: branch protection prevents direct push to main — agents must use end --pr (or end --auto-merge). The auto-convert from --merge to --pr handles this. commit-msg hook is in global hooks dir (~/.config/git/hooks/) not in repo — other agents cloning this repo won't have it. WIP crash trap still uses --no-verify by design.
